en: And the people of Israel, the whole congregation, came into the wilderness of Zin in the first month, and the people stayed in Kadesh. And Miriam died there and was buried there.
zh: 正月間，以色列全體會眾到了尋的曠野，就住在加低斯；米利暗死在那裡，也埋葬在那裡。

en: Now there was no water for the congregation. And they assembled themselves together against Moses and against Aaron.
zh: 會眾沒有水喝，就聚集攻擊摩西和亞倫。

en: And the people quarreled with Moses and said, "Would that we had perished when our brothers perished before the LORD!
zh: 人民與摩西爭鬧，說：“但願我們的兄弟在耶和華面前死去的時候，我們也一同死去！

en: Why have you brought the assembly of the LORD into this wilderness, that we should die here, both we and our cattle?
zh: 你們為甚麼把耶和華的會眾領到這曠野來，使我們和我們的牲畜都死在這裡呢？

en: And why have you made us come up out of Egypt to bring us to this evil place? It is no place for grain or figs or vines or pomegranates, and there is no water to drink."
zh: 你們為甚麼使我們出埃及，領我們到這壞地方來呢？這裡不能撒種，沒有無花果樹、葡萄樹、石榴樹，也沒有水喝。”

en: Then Moses and Aaron went from the presence of the assembly to the entrance of the tent of meeting and fell on their faces. And the glory of the LORD appeared to them,
zh: 摩西和亞倫於是離開會眾，來到會幕門口，俯伏在地；耶和華的榮光向他們顯現。

en: and the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Take the staff, and assemble the congregation, you and Aaron your brother, and tell the rock before their eyes to yield its water. So you shall bring water out of the rock for them and give drink to the congregation and their cattle."
zh: “你要拿著杖，和你的哥哥亞倫聚集會眾，在他們眼前，吩咐磐石出水；這樣你就可以使磐石流出水來，給會眾和他們的牲畜喝。”

en: And Moses took the staff from before the LORD, as he commanded him.
zh: 於是，摩西照著耶和華吩咐他的，從耶和華面前拿了杖去。

en: Then Moses and Aaron gathered the assembly together before the rock, and he said to them, "Hear now, you rebels: shall we bring water for you out of this rock?"
zh: 摩西和亞倫聚集了會眾到磐石面前；摩西對他們說：“悖逆的人哪，你們要聽，我們為你們使水從磐石中流出來嗎？”

en: And Moses lifted up his hand and struck the rock with his staff twice, and water came out abundantly, and the congregation drank, and their livestock.
zh: 摩西舉手，用杖擊打磐石兩次，就有很多水流出來，會眾和他們的牲畜都喝了。

en: And the LORD said to Moses and Aaron, "Because you did not believe in me, to uphold me as holy in the eyes of the people of Israel, therefore you shall not bring this assembly into the land that I have given them."
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：“因為你們不信我，不在以色列人眼前尊我為聖，所以你們必不得領這會眾進入我賜給他們的地。”

en: These are the waters of Meribah, where the people of Israel quarreled with the LORD, and through them he showed himself holy.
zh: 這就是米利巴水，因為以色列人在那裡與耶和華爭鬧，耶和華在他們中間顯為聖。

en: Moses sent messengers from Kadesh to the king of Edom: "Thus says your brother Israel: You know all the hardship that we have met:
zh: 摩西從加低斯派使者去見以東王說：“你的兄弟以色列這樣說：你知道我們遭遇的一切困難，

en: how our fathers went down to Egypt, and we lived in Egypt a long time. And the Egyptians dealt harshly with us and our fathers.
zh: 就是我們的列祖下到埃及去，我們在埃及住了很多日子；埃及人惡待我們和我們的列祖；

en: And when we cried to the LORD, he heard our voice and sent an angel and brought us out of Egypt. And here we are in Kadesh, a city on the edge of your territory.
zh: 我們向耶和華呼求，他就聽了我們的聲音，派使者把我們從埃及領出來；現在我們就在你邊界上的城加低斯。

en: Please let us pass through your land. We will not pass through field or vineyard, or drink water from a well. We will go along the King's Highway. We will not turn aside to the right hand or to the left until we have passed through your territory."
zh: 求你容我們從你的地經過；我們不走過田地和葡萄園，也不喝井裡的水，我們只走大路，不偏左也不偏右，直到走過了你的境地。”

en: But Edom said to him, "You shall not pass through, lest I come out with the sword against you."
zh: 以東王對使者說：“你不可從我這裡經過，免得我帶著刀出來攻擊你。”

en: And the people of Israel said to him, "We will go up by the highway, and if we drink of your water, I and my livestock, then I will pay for it. Let me only pass through on foot, nothing more."
zh: 以色列人對他說：“我們要走大路上去，我們和牲畜若是喝了你的水，我必照價付你；不求別的事，只求你容我們步行經過。”

en: But he said, "You shall not pass through." And Edom came out against them with a large army and with a strong force.
zh: 以東王說：“你不可經過。”他就率領很多人出來，要用強硬的手攻擊以色列人。

en: Thus Edom refused to give Israel passage through his territory, so Israel turned away from him.
zh: 這樣，以東王不肯讓以色列人從他的境內經過，以色列人就離開他去了。

en: And they journeyed from Kadesh, and the people of Israel, the whole congregation, came to Mount Hor.
zh: 以色列全體會眾從加低斯起行，到了何珥山。

en: And the LORD said to Moses and Aaron at Mount Hor, on the border of the land of Edom,
zh: 耶和華在以東地邊界的何珥山對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "Let Aaron be gathered to his people, for he shall not enter the land that I have given to the people of Israel, because you rebelled against my command at the waters of Meribah.
zh: “亞倫要歸到他本族人那裡去，他必不得進入我賜給以色列人的那地，因為在米利巴水的事上，你們違背了我的吩咐。

en: Take Aaron and Eleazar his son and bring them up to Mount Hor.
zh: 你要帶著亞倫和他的兒子以利亞撒，一同上何珥山去；

en: And strip Aaron of his garments and put them on Eleazar his son. And Aaron shall be gathered to his people and shall die there."
zh: 把亞倫的衣服脫下來，給他兒子以利亞撒穿上；亞倫就歸到他本族人那裡去，死在山上。”

en: Moses did as the LORD commanded. And they went up Mount Hor in the sight of all the congregation.
zh: 摩西就照著耶和華吩咐的行了，三人當著全體會眾的眼前上了何珥山。

en: And Moses stripped Aaron of his garments and put them on Eleazar his son. And Aaron died there on the top of the mountain. Then Moses and Eleazar came down from the mountain.
zh: 摩西把亞倫的衣服脫下來，給他的兒子以利亞撒穿上；亞倫就死在山頂那裡。於是，摩西和以利亞撒從山上下來。

en: And when all the congregation saw that Aaron had perished, all the house of Israel wept for Aaron thirty days.
zh: 全體會眾見亞倫死了，以色列全家就為亞倫哀哭了三十天。
